prompt: For a protein engineering research program, generate a tight-binding protein binder targeting Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS1, NS3 helicase/protease, NS5 RdRp) (flavivirus polyprotein (E glycoprotein, NS3 serine protease/helicase, NS5 RdRp)) expressed by Dengue virus type 1. The binder should achieve sub-nanomolar binding. specify a protocol for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using RoseTTAFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Genome polyprotein (contains prM/E, NS1, NS3 helicase/protease, NS5 RdRp); organism: Dengue virus type 1; catalogue version v1.0
